title: SpecOps Initiative
description: Initiative metadata file (initiative.json) tracking multi-spec features, execution waves, and progress

id.description: Initiative identifier matching the file name

description.description: Detailed description of the initiative scope and goals

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the initiative was created

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the initiative was last modified

author.description: Author name (from git config or user input)

specs.description: Array of spec IDs belonging to this initiative

order.description: Execution waves — each inner array is a wave of spec IDs that can execute in parallel

skeleton.description: Spec ID of the walking skeleton (first wave-1 spec establishing the end-to-end integration path)

status.description: Initiative status — active when any member spec is incomplete, completed when all are done
